title: Ancient City Maps
description: A lightweight mod that adds maps to Ancient Cities to Cartographer trades.
body:
# Ancient City Maps **Ever spent days searching for an Ancient City? Now you don't have to!**

This mod adds a potential trade for an Ancient City Map to Master level Cartographers.

![Ancient City Map Trade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ff880680d0d2a449ce7e5c39c9666ad857b2048.png)
![Ancient City Map](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63d0132413d30ecf026f6b72a677da69bbdf6a9c.png)


_This mod will not retroactively replace Cartographer trades, new Cartographers must be used after installation._

_My first ever Minecraft mod!_
